provisions.text: No structure shall be erected or constructed to be used for human habitation, whether permanent or temporary, in any FW Zone.

A structure or structures, if permitted, shall be constructed and placed on the site so as to offer the minimum obstruction to the flow of flood waters and shall be firmly anchored to prevent floatation.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: SPECIAL PROVISIONS: ALTERATION OF LAND LEVELS

provisions.text: SPECIAL PROVISIONS: ALTERATION OF LAND LEVELS

Within the 1 in 20 year floodway, and unless otherwise permitted in this Part, no alteration of land levels or filling in of the floodplain is permitted for the purpose of erecting a permanent structure or building.
Within the 1 in 20 year floodway no alteration of land levels or filling in of the floodplain is permitted which affects the capacity of the floodway or increases flood heights.
Such fill and other materials shall be stabilized through the use of landscaping or other appropriate means to prevent erosion.

a) No structure shall be erected or constructed to be used for human habitation, whether permanent or temporary, in any FW Zone. b) A structure or structures, if permitted, shall be constructed and placed on the site so as to offer the minimum obstruction to the flow of flood waters and shall be firmly anchored to prevent floatation.

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 3. SPECIAL PROVISIONS: ALTERATION OF LAND LEVELS
content_blocks.text: a) Within the 1 in 20 year floodway, and unless otherwise permitted in this Part, no alteration of land levels or filling in of the floodplain is permitted for the purpose of erecting a permanent structure or building. b) Within the 1 in 20 year floodway no alteration of land levels or filling in of the floodplain is permitted which affects the capacity of the floodway or increases flood heights. c) Such fill and other materials shall be stabilized through the use of landscaping or other appropriate means to prevent erosion.
